title: Tasks shared across multiple boards
excerpt: We would really love to see a feature that allows a task to be located on and synced to multiple boards. This would be so valuable for our team.

posts.author: lucy (Lucy Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: We would really love to see a feature that allows a task to be located on and synced to multiple boards. This would be so valuable for our team.

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @lucy , we’ve recently developed and launched what you need exactly. This has been a popular demand and it’s now available in the marketplace. Free plan available too for trying it out Link to our App in the Marketplace
